choice_list: enemies in your next three combats have 1 hp

options.text: [ Enemies in your next three combats have 1 HP ]
options.label: Enemies in your next three combats have 1 HP

screen_state.body_text: As you walk into the room you hear a gurgling and the grinding of metals. Before you is a slime-like creature that ate too much scrap for its own good. From the center of the creature you see glints of strange light, perhaps something magical? It looks like you can get some treasure if you just reach inside its... opening. However, the acid and sharp objects may hurt.

options.text: [Reach Inside] Lose 3 HP. 25%: Find a Relic.
options.label: Reach Inside

screen_state.body_text: Success!  After rummaging through the metal and burning acid, you finally grab hold of a relic and yank it out.  You pull your way out of the ooze damaged but rewarded.

You fall into a puddle.  IT'S MADE OF SLIME GOOP!!  Frantically, you claw yourself out over several minutes as you feel the goop starting to burn.  You can feel goop in your ears, goop in your nose, goop everywhere.   Climbing out, you notice that some of your gold is missing. Looking back to the puddle you see your missing coins combined with gold from unfortunate adventurers mixed together in the puddle.
Feeling the sting of the goop as the prolonged exposure starts to melt away at your skin, you manage to fish out the gold.
A strange blue humanoid with a golden helm(?) approaches you with a huge smile.  "Hello friend! I am Cleric! Are you interested in my services?!" the creature shouts, loudly.

options.text: [Purify] 50 Gold: Remove a card from your deck.
options.label: Purify

screen_state.body_text: A warm golden light envelops your body and dissipates.  The creature grins. "Cleric best healer. Have a good day!"
